title: DWS Reviewed Parameter Concept Dictionary
description: Human-reviewed source of parameter concepts (equivalent flag spellings for the same entity) and per-command overrides. Build-time generators reduce these concepts against each command's real Cobra flags; they must never rewrite this file.

$schema.description: Relative editor contract. Keep this value unchanged so agents can validate the dictionary without network access.

morphological_rules.description: Table-free, global name normalization behaviors realized by pflag SetNormalizeFunc. Documentation of morph behavior, not per-command aliases.

concepts.description: Global concepts keyed by stable concept id. Go validation additionally rejects members that overlap across concepts and members that intersect their own excludes.

command_overrides.description: Per-command overrides keyed by the command path (without leading 'dws'). Only needed for generic-name binding, command-scoped aliases, co-occurrence whitelisting, or reject.

conceptId.description: Stable concept id in lower snake_case.

flagToken.description: A flag spelling token without leading dashes.

commandPath.description: Exact command path without the leading 'dws' or flags. A leading '+' segment marks a shortcut subcommand. Existence against the real Cobra tree is validated by the generator, not this schema.

risk.description: Reviewed risk band. green concepts reduce freely; yellow concepts need extra reviewer attention on excludes boundaries.

denotes.description: Human description of the single entity this concept denotes.

canonical_hint.description: Governance hint only; the runtime reduces to whichever real flag the command exposes, not to this value.

members.description: Equivalent spellings that all denote the concept's entity.

excludes.description: Spellings that denote a DIFFERENT entity and must never be reduced into this concept.

bind.description: Maps a generic real flag (e.g. id) to a concept id so concept members can reduce onto it. Go validation requires every value to be a declared concept id.

scoped_aliases.description: Command-scoped emitted->realFlag aliases. Never promoted to a global concept member.

block.description: Emitted names that must never be reduced on this command; they route to did-you-mean instead.

ambiguous.description: Reviewed co-occurrence whitelist: when a concept intersects two or more real flags on this command, the emitted names listed here are expected to route to did-you-mean rather than fail generation.

confirm.description: Reviewer flagged this override as needing user confirmation of the mapping semantics.

scope_strict.description: This alias must stay strictly command-local; another command has a real and different flag with the same spelling.

investigate.description: Reviewer flagged this override as needing source-case investigation before landing.

expect.description: Either the real flag the emitted name must reduce to, or one of the did-you-mean sentinels 'did-you-mean:ambiguous' / 'did-you-mean:blocked'.

via.description: Reviewer annotation of the reduction path; documentation only.

occ.description: Occurrence count in the evaluation batch; frequency evidence only.
